instruction: Change from equal-width buckets to equal-frequency (quantile) buckets. Assign each value to one of n_buckets quantile buckets such that approximately the same number of values fall in each bucket. Sort the values, divide them into n_buckets roughly equal groups, and assign each value the 0-indexed bucket number of its rank group. When len(values) is not evenly divisible by n_buckets, earlier buckets may receive one extra element. Values with equal rank that fall on a quantile boundary go into the lower-numbered bucket. Return the bucket indices in the same order as the input values (not sorted order). Return 0-indexed bucket assignments.
